_comment: IAM Trust Policy — Amazon Connect WebRTC Contact API
Controls which AWS service (or account) can assume the execution role.
1. lambda.amazonaws.com  — for Lambda + API Gateway / Function URL
2. ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com — for ECS Fargate / Docker container
Keep only the block(s) that match your deployment model.
Remove the unused block before applying with aws iam create-role.

Statement._comment: Remove if not deploying to Lambda.
Remove if not deploying to ECS / Docker.
